quality_score_1_5.1: Fails the task or introduces severe errors.
quality_score_1_5.2: Partially completes the task but needs major rework.
quality_score_1_5.3: Usable with clear gaps or manual repair.

merge_rules: Three samples can only justify proceed_to_pilot, revise, or reject.
Formal merge requires at least five samples and at least three sample types.
Do not merge if quality drops, critical risk is missed, or candidate succeeds only by removing necessary guardrails.
If token cost drops but quality variance rises, trigger Red Team or more samples.
